description: This figure is a schematic diagram of the multiaxial forging (MAF) process for Fe-30Mn-9Al-0.8C low-density steel samples. The original cuboid sample has an initial dimension of 20×20×30 mm. The schematic illustrates the full procedure of one MAF pass, including three sequential compression steps along three orthogonal directions, each followed by a 90° rotation around a specified axis (y, z, then x axis in sequence), with 33% height reduction per compression step. The pressing direction, constrained direction, and material flow direction during each compression are clearly marked. This schematic demonstrates the operation principle of warm MAF conducted at 250 °C in the study, supporting the experimental boundary condition setup for subsequent finite element simulation and modified Johnson-Cook constitutive model validation.
